pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.title: Party-Level Scaling
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.toggle: Match Perception, saves, and skills to the party
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.noParty: No active party or player-owned characters were found, so the module has nothing to scale against yet.
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.disabled: Disabled. This NPC stays at its native level-based values (NPC level {npcLevel}, party level {partyLevel}, delta {delta}).
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.match: Enabled. This NPC already matches party level {partyLevel}, so no modifier shift is needed.
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.enabled: Enabled. Perception, saves, and skills shift by {delta} to normalize from NPC level {npcLevel} to party level {partyLevel}.
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.sheet.detailUnava: Level difference details are unavailable until a party level can be resolved.
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.settings.partySou: Choose where the module gets the party level from before it computes the NPC scaling delta.
Active party level, then player characters
Active party members, then player characters
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.settings.levelAgg: When the party level is calculated from a list of characters, choose how those levels are collapsed into one value.
pf2e-npc-party-scaling.settings.modifier: Choose whether the party-minus-NPC delta can move in both directions, only upward, or only downward before extra math is applied.
Multiply the computed delta by this value before rounding.
Add this flat value after the multiplier and then round to the final applied delta.
